description: Population-draft full-cell pack for common opener responses when facing a 3-bet at 15/25/40/70bb.
instructions: Population-draft seed only. Do not mark approved without owner review.
Every cell is explicit and validates to 169 hands.
Use as review scaffolding, not final chart-action truth.

charts.title: UTG vs HJ 3-Bet @ 15bb
charts.sourceNotes: Population draft - review before approval. Constructed from the existing 2026-05-17 population rulebook and current typed seed structure. Facing-3bet ranges are practical placeholders, not owner-approved or copied from paid/gated chart content. No colour-as-data extraction. Preserve one action token per hand cell.
